Event: The Prince of Darkness Castle Siege

Secret Conspirator Totem

Once in a while, the unit removes 4 random shields or damage-reducing effects from a random enemy, dealing physical damage equal to 40% of the target's max health to this unit and all enemy units in a small radius around them.

Requirements: 90
